title: monitoring — realtime broadcast channels
description: Four broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channel for the monitoring dashboard; alert-scoped channel for live-updating the alert list + acknowledgment status; incident-scoped channel for the incident detail live timeline; provider-scoped channel for the per-provider circuit-breaker + health indicator. Reverb driver (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.monitoring
channels.description: Tenant-wide monitoring dashboard live-update. Sink for the aggregated dashboard read-model.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (ops OR admin OR owner OR support)
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). signal_context is included but PII-redacted.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.monitoring.alerts
channels.description: Alert-scoped live updates. Powers the alerts list + acknowledgment status indicators.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (ops OR admin OR owner OR support)

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.monitoring.incidents
channels.description: Incident-scoped live updates. Powers the incident detail live timeline.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (ops OR admin OR owner OR support)
channels.notes: Every MonitoringIncidentOpened fires a companion push notification via the notifications module.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.monitoring.providers
channels.description: Provider-scoped health + config activity. Powers the per-provider status chip + circuit-breaker state indicator.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (ops OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Config field NEVER broadcast (encrypted at rest; the channel does not decrypt). Only the fact-of-change is broadcast; the SDUI re-fetches to get updated (redacted) config view.
